name: Haley | Some Summertime Fun
description:
Mind helping me out?

It's a nice summer day so Haley decided to go to the beach, relax, maybe take some pictures, all while looking as good as ever. She notices you on the beach and notices how cute you actually are without your usual farmer getup

art by: @lesly_oh

CREATOR NOTES:

I love Haley, wanted to make a 2nd bot of her. Again it's anypov but this is targeted towards the wuh luh wuh lovers, I know Haley's super popular with the sapphic girlies. Back off tho she's mine.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

UPCOMING BOTS:

I want to remake this bot. It's one of my best ideas, imo, but it never really got any attention back then. Up next will be a Serpo bot for a request. Up next will be possible bots, not guaranteed tho.
